features.name: task output argument as packed array
features.description: Code should include a task with an output argument declared as a packed array type

features.name: unpacked array passed to task
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array being passed as an argument to a task

features.name: array element assignment in task
features.description: Code should include assigning to individual elements of an array within a task body

extraction_summary.note: Original tool iverilog remapped to verilator for schema compliance
